trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four momentum signals aligned — RSI in sweet spot at 57.1, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price above SMA-20; uranium sector continues to benefit from nuclear energy tailwinds.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — NASDAQ down a fraction, S&P 500 unchanged — signaling a pause rather than a directional move. Existing positions look healthy, particularly AMZN which continues to trend up above our cost basis. Deploying remaining cash into two high-scoring momentum candidates (UEC and FSLY) that have all technical signals aligned without being overbought, using remaining cash productively while keeping 3 open slots as a buffer given the uncertain macro backdrop.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets traded sideways on April 27, with the S&P 500 essentially flat and the NASDAQ dipping fractionally as investors took a wait-and-see stance ahead of upcoming earnings and economic data. The neutral tone reflected a market in consolidation mode after recent volatility, with no single catalyst driving strong conviction in either direction. Sector rotation continued quietly beneath the surface, with energy and tech infrastructure names showing relative strength while broader indices held steady.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市4月27日呈現橫盤整理格局，標普500指數收平，納斯達克指數小幅下跌，投資者在等待即將公布的企業財報及經濟數據前保持觀望。整體市場氛圍偏向中性，近期波動後進入盤整階段，市場缺乏明確的單一催化劑。板塊輪動在檯面下悄然進行，能源及科技基礎設施類股展現相對強勢，主要指數則維持穩定。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing upward price and technical strength, betting that recent trends will continue for a period before reversing. Traders use indicators like RSI (relative strength index) and MACD (moving average convergence divergence) to measure how strong and sustained a stock's momentum is — the sweet spot is RSI between 55–70, meaning the stock is trending up but not yet overbought. Today's picks (UEC, FSLY) scored 95 precisely because all their momentum indicators aligned without flashing warning signs.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是一種追蹤強勢股的策略——買入近期價格和技術指標持續向上的股票，押注這種趨勢在逆轉前仍會延續一段時間。交易者使用RSI（相對強弱指數）和MACD（指數移動平均線）等指標來衡量股票動量的強度與持續性。RSI介於55至70之間是「甜蜜區」，代表股票趨勢向上但尚未進入超買區。今日選股（UEC、FSLY）評分達95分，正是因為所有動量指標同步發出看多信號，且未出現任何超買警示。
